description: FSCM's purpose allows for credit evaluation on sales related transactions, management of blocked transactions, collection of Accounts Receivable, and be a source of risk class and data credit hierarchy. Features include electronic bill presentment and payment, collections management, credit management. Also includes dispute management.
__comment_data_retention_in_days: Increasing data_retention_in_days for the schema will incur additional costs for the Product Owner. Changing it from 1 day to a longer period will have cost implications, so please be aware of the potential consequences
